Raytheon Anschütz ·Navigation & Electronics

Raytheon Anschütz Standard 22 Gyrocompass

Spare parts for Raytheon Anschütz Standard 22 (and 20/22NX) gyrocompass systems – gyrosphere, main unit, service packs, supporting liquid.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
111-006Gyrosphere (core sensor) – Standard 20 / 22 / 22NX
110-233.NG002Main Unit – Standard 22
110-233.x19Service Pack – annual / 18-month inspection kit (includes items below) – Standard 20 / 22 / 22NX
148-162 E01Supporting Liquid (gyroscope fluid, part of service pack) – Standard 20 / 22
148-398Distilled Water (part of service pack) – Standard 20 / 22
148-398.00-002Filler Pipe (part of service pack) – Standard 20 / 22
110-222.X01Set of Gaskets (part of service pack) – Standard 20 / 22
110-231.40xPump Rotor with Axis (part of service pack) – Standard 22
110-233.101 E10Outer Sphere PCB – Standard 22
110-233.X13Connection PCB (main supply / comms distribution) – Standard 22
110-233.X12Power Supply PCB – Standard 22
110-233.X08Sensor PCB – Standard 22
110-222.X04Pump Complete, STD20 – Standard 20
110-222.101 E01Sensor PCB, STD20 – Standard 20

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
